ddls:
CREATE TABLE "web_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "p_date" TEXT /* Date of the request */,
  "p_time" TEXT /* Time of the request */,
  "client_ip" TEXT /* Client's IP address */,
  "host" TEXT /* Host name of the server */,
  "web_category" TEXT /* Category of the web content */,
  "response_code" TEXT /* HTTP response code */,
  "request_method" TEXT /* HTTP request method (GET, POST, etc.) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string from the client's browser */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Content type of the response */,
  "referer" TEXT /* Referrer URL */,
  "uri_port" INTEGER /* Port number of the URI */,
  "server_ip" TEXT /* Server's IP address */,
  "sc_bytes" INTEGER /* Size of the server response in bytes */,
  "cs_bytes" INTEGER /* Size of the client request in bytes */,
  "full_uri" TEXT /* Full URI requested */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session identifier for grouping related requests */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User identifier for tracking individual users */,
  "click_path" TEXT /* Path of clicks leading to the current page */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., page view, click, scroll) */,
  "geo_location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_web_logs_user_agent FOREIGN KEY ("user_agent") REFERENCES user_agents ("agent_string"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_web_logs_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_web_logs_content_type FOREIGN KEY ("content_type") REFERENCES content_types ("content_type"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_web_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_web_logs_click_path FOREIGN KEY ("click_path") REFERENCES click_paths ("path_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_web_logs_geo_location FOREIGN KEY ("geo_location") REFERENCES geo_locations ("geo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_web_logs_referer FOREIGN KEY ("referer") REFERENCES referrers ("referrer_url"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_web_logs_response_code FOREIGN KEY ("response_code") REFERENCES response_codes ("response_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user agent */,
  "agent_string" TEXT /* User agent string from the client's browser */,
  "browser" TEXT /* Browser used by the client */,
  "os" TEXT /* Operating system used by the client */,
  "device" TEXT /* Type of device (Desktop, Mobile, Tablet) */,
  "browser_version" TEXT /* Version of the browser */,
  "os_version" TEXT /* Version of the operating system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "response_codes" (
  "code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response code */,
  "response_code" TEXT /* HTTP response code */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the response code */,
  "is_success" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the response code is a success */,
  "is_error" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the response code is an error */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content type */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* MIME type of the content */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the content type */,
  "content_category" TEXT /* Category of the content (e.g., image, video, text) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referrers" (
  "referrer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referrer */,
  "referrer_url" TEXT /* URL of the referrer */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source of the referral */,
  "referrer_type" TEXT /* Type of referrer (e.g., search engine, social media) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referrer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User identifier for the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "click_paths" (
  "path_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each click path */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session identifier for the click path */,
  "click_sequence" INTEGER /* Sequence number of the click in the path */,
  "click_url" TEXT /* URL of the clicked page */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("path_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geo_locations" (
  "geo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographic location */,
  "client_ip" TEXT /* Client's IP address */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the client */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the client */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geo_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each log entry
